name: fsn-pulse
title: FSN Pulse — server performance monitor (by FactorioServers.com)
author: FactorioServers.com (Cinder Logic LLC)
description: Registers a single achievement-safe console command, /fsn-pulse, that reports the server's current tick, speed, pause state, and player count over RCON so FactorioServers.com can graph UPS. No event handlers, no gameplay changes, no data collection. Fully auditable: https://github.com/factorioservers/fsn-pulse
